name: Copywriting
tagline: Spin up headlines, ads, and landing copy that stay on brand and on message.
heroSubtitle: Ryu drafts headlines, ad copy, and landing pages grounded on your brand voice and offer, gives you many angles to choose from, and keeps unannounced campaigns private until launch.
intro: Copy lives and dies on voice, angle, and volume: you need many sharp variations fast, all true to the brand and the offer. Ryu grounds short-form copy on your voice guidelines and product facts, generates angles to test, and keeps pre-launch campaigns on a local model so nothing leaks. A copywriter picks and polishes the winner.

highlights.title: Many angles, fast
highlights.description: Generate a batch of headline, hook, and CTA variations from one offer so you have real options to test, not a single guess.

highlights.title: On-brand every time
highlights.description: Ground copy on your voice guidelines and product facts with Spaces and RAG so variations stay consistent and never misstate the offer.

highlights.title: Pick the best model
highlights.description: Swap between a punchy model for hooks and a careful one for compliance-heavy copy, choosing per task without lock-in.

highlights.title: Pre-launch privacy
highlights.description: Keep unannounced product names, prices, and campaigns on a local model with no telemetry until you are ready to go live.

useCases.title: Ad variation sets
useCases.description: Generate a batch of ad headlines and primary text in different angles from one product brief, ready for A/B testing.

useCases.title: Landing page copy
useCases.description: Draft a hero, benefit bullets, and CTA for a landing page grounded on your offer and voice, structured section by section.

useCases.title: Email subject lines
useCases.description: Spin up many subject line and preview text options for a campaign, each tuned to a different hook or audience.

useCases.title: Product and feature naming
useCases.description: Brainstorm name and tagline candidates for a product or feature that fit your brand, with a short rationale for each.

useCases.title: Tone and length rewrites
useCases.description: Take an approved line and produce shorter, bolder, or more formal versions to fit a specific channel or character limit.

useCases.title: Campaign copy in one workflow
useCases.description: Run a workflow that drafts ad, email, and landing copy for a single campaign, then drops it into your marketing tool via a connected app.

examplePrompts: Write ten ad headlines for our new plan in our brand voice, each on a different angle.
Draft hero copy, three benefit bullets, and a CTA for this landing page using our offer details.
Give me eight email subject lines for the launch, with preview text for each.
Brainstorm five name and tagline pairs for this feature, with a one-line rationale per pair.
Rewrite this CTA in three shorter, bolder versions that fit under 40 characters.

faq.q: Will the copy stay on brand?
faq.a: Yes. Put your voice guidelines and product facts in a Space and Ryu grounds every variation on them with RAG, so the tone is consistent and the offer is stated correctly.

faq.q: Can I keep an unannounced campaign private?
faq.a: Yes. Ryu runs a local model by default with no telemetry, so unreleased product names, prices, and campaign copy stay on your device until launch.
No. Ryu generates the volume of variations and angles fast, but a copywriter selects, sharpens, and approves the lines that actually ship.

ctaTitle: More angles, less staring at a blank page.
ctaSubtitle: Generate on-brand headlines, ads, and landing copy in seconds, then pick the winner.
